message:
feat(mermaid): add xyChart diagram parser + layout + render (bd-hudcn.1.12.1)

- Add XySeriesKind enum and XyChartSeries AST type
- Add XyChartXAxis, XyChartYAxis, XyChartSeries Statement variants
- Implement parse_xychart_line() for x-axis/y-axis/bar/line series
- Add IR normalization: axes and series become nodes with class tags
- Add layout_xychart_diagram() with vertical stacking
- Add xychart_series_fill() for bar/line/axis coloring
- Update compatibility matrix: xy_chart Unsupported -> Partial
- 2 xyChart tests + 611 lib tests passing, clippy clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
